headlines.title: Trump says Iran has not agreed to a U.S. deal because ‘they’re strong, they’re proud’
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Friday said Iranian leaders have not yet reached a deal with the U.S. to end the ongoing war because they’re “strong” and “proud.”

headlines.title: DOJ urges judge not to block ‘anti-weaponization’ fund despite already pledging not to pursue it
headlines.description: A federal judge last week temporarily blocked the $1.8 billion fund from being used after a Jan. 6 prosecutor sued to block the Trump administration’s actions.

headlines.title: Democratic dread in Maine: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we dive into the Democratic response to the latest Graham Platner controversy and the questions that still surround Rep. Tom Kean Jr.’s absence.

headlines.title: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo could top 20,000 cases in worst case, CDC says
headlines.description: The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda could lead to more than 20,000 cases and over 2,000 deaths in a worst-case scenario, according to a CDC report.

headlines.title: ‘I’m not going to defend someone with that kind of history’: Rep. Dingell on Graham Platner
headlines.description: Rep. Debbie Dingell (D-Mich.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the latest legislation passed by the House, including the Iran War Powers resolution and aid for Ukraine. Rep. Dingell also reacts to the latest controversy surrounding Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner.

headlines.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran hasn't made a deal because ‘they’re strong’ and ‘proud’
headlines.description: President Trump sits down for an exclusive interview with Meet the Press as the U.S. looks to make a deal with Iran to end the war.

headlines.title: ‘YOLO caucus’ in Senate is ‘lighting fires’ but stopping short of ‘burning the whole house down’
headlines.description: President Trump is in Wisconsin as he secures a legislative win after the Senate passes the reconciliation bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol despite pushback on some of his other priorities. NBC News correspondents Gabe Gutierrez, Melanie Zanona and Christine Romans report on the Trump agenda.

headlines.title: Where the redistricting fight stands heading into the midterms
headlines.description: After 10 states enacted new congressional maps, Republicans are in position to gain up to 16 seats this fall, compared with six for the Democrats, as the parties vie for control of the House.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: FBI warns drone operators to stay away from World Cup matches
headlines.description: Security for the FIFA World Cup is expanding skyward, with law enforcement agencies preparing for drone activity that could range from a nuisance to a serious threat as the United States hosts the tournament starting next week.

headlines.title: Former CIA officer accused of stashing gold bars ordered to remain in jail pending trial
headlines.description: ALEXANDRIA, Va. — The former CIA officer found with $40 million in gold bars stashed at his Virginia home was ordered held behind bars Friday until he goes on trial for criminal theft of public money after a prosecutor branded him a “master manipulator.”David Rush, a senior CIA officer who worked on one of the most highly sensitive programs in the U.S. government, watched as prosecutors and his defense attorney sparred in a Virginia courtroom over whether he should remain in jail

headlines.title: Democrats navigate a new Graham Platner controversy in Maine’s battleground Senate race
headlines.description: For the Democratic Party, the road to Maine’s Senate primary is paved in dread.
